## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. With input `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or log output if available.

- **Python**: (e.g. 3.12.3)
